title: Brno, South Moravia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Brno, South Moravia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Brno is a city in South Moravia with a population of 381,000. Moravia’s largest city, a dynamic university hub with a thriving tech scene, modernist architecture, and a famous international film festival.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
